summary: Iteration 53: Verified push notification opt-in system and ghost user fix. Push is NOT triggered during login - it's now opt-in via PushPromptBanner component. Staff deletion cascade-closes open attendance records. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend login flows verified - no push dialogs appear on login.
critical_code_review_comments: push.js: isPushAvailable() correctly checks window.Capacitor.Plugins.PushNotifications before proceeding
push.js: initPushNotifications() returns {success, message} object as expected
push.js: wasPushEnabled() checks localStorage for heva_push_enabled
AuthContext.js: NO initPushNotifications import or call on login - verified via grep
AuthContext.js line 169: logout() calls teardownPushNotifications via dynamic import
HevaOpsLayout.js: PushPromptBanner imported (line 7) and rendered after header (line 115)
AdminDashboard.js: PushPromptBanner imported (line 18) and rendered before loading state (line 253)
PushPromptBanner.js: Only shows on native Capacitor devices (isPushAvailable check)
staff.py lines 197-213: delete_staff cascade-closes open attendance with flagged=True, flag_reason='user_deleted'
attendance.py lines 665-690: force_close_stale_shifts endpoint cleans orphan records
RestaurantSettings.js lines 827-857: Push Notifications card with Enable button (data-testid='enable-push-btn') exists as fallback
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_cascade_staff_* for cascade delete testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified: (1) Push notification is now opt-in via PushPromptBanner component - NOT auto-triggered on login. (2) PushPromptBanner only shows on native Capacitor devices (not visible in web browser testing). (3) Staff sees banner in HevaOpsLayout, admin in AdminDashboard. (4) Settings > Security still has manual Enable button as fallback. (5) Staff deletion cascade-closes open attendance records with flag_reason='user_deleted'. (6) POST /api/attendance/force-close-stale cleans orphan records. (7) AuthContext logout calls teardownPushNotifications via dynamic import.

push_not_triggered_on_login.evidence: No initPushNotifications import in AuthContext.js. Staff and admin login tested - no push dialogs appeared.

push_prompt_banner_in_heva_ops.evidence: HevaOpsLayout.js imports PushPromptBanner (line 7) and renders it after header (line 115)

push_prompt_banner_in_admin_dashboard.evidence: AdminDashboard.js imports PushPromptBanner (line 18) and renders it before loading state (line 253)

push_banner_only_on_native.evidence: PushPromptBanner uses isPushAvailable() which checks window.Capacitor.Plugins.PushNotifications - returns false on web

push_js_is_push_available.evidence: push.js line 18: export async function isPushAvailable() checks window.Capacitor.Plugins.PushNotifications

push_js_init_returns_object.evidence: push.js initPushNotifications() returns {success: boolean, message: string}

push_js_was_push_enabled.evidence: push.js line 104: wasPushEnabled() checks localStorage for heva_push_enabled

auth_context_no_push_init.evidence: grep for initPushNotifications in AuthContext.js returns empty - no import or call

staff_delete_cascade_attendance.evidence: Backend test passed: DELETE /api/restaurant/staff/{id} returns closed_shifts count

force_close_stale_endpoint.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/attendance/force-close-stale returns {message, closed}

settings_security_push_card.evidence: RestaurantSettings.js lines 827-857: Push Notifications card with data-testid='enable-push-btn'

mocked_apis.note: PushNotifications native plugin is not available in web preview - this is expected behavior, not a mock
